notes: CYLNDR Cannes 2026 — 367 entries. 2026-05-28 update 2: +3 entries from Cheil client brand research (Tom Evans/Kraft Heinz Kitchen adjacent; James Whitemore/Indeed ignore; Chris Bellinger/PepsiCo ignore). Events nav added to all site pages. 2026-05-28 update 1: +11 entries (0 fit, 2 adjacent: Brieane Olson/PacSun, Kathryn Swallow/Haleon; 9 ignore). DEPT Secret Garden speaker swap: Elke Karskens replaces Terri Wang Tue 10:30. Darkroom CPG Garden flagged as new high-ICP venue (no named speakers yet). ICP expansion 2026-05-27: 14 adjacent→fit reclassifications, fit count now 19.
